text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, I know you. Ehehe, did you<n>hear me just
now?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since you're here, lemme rant! You<n>know
McQueen, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She told me the trick to long-distance<n>running is
keeping a steady pace, then<n>suggested I try
doing tempo runs.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But running at a set pace is sucha drag! It feels SO much better to runas fast as I can!
choice_data_list: You should run the way that best suits you!

But think of how good it'll feel to sprint after
holding back.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you get it! The best type of<n>training really is
the one that motivates<n>you the most!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to sprint a lap at top<n>speed! Here
comes the mighty Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems that she's able to focus<n>much better on
her running while<n>training the way she wants.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I getcha! Maybe you're right!<n>An all-out
sprint after a paced run,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I bet that'll feel way better than just<n>running
normally! Hehe, what a great<n>idea!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give this tempo running<n>thing another
chance. Thanks for<n>talking this out with me!
